narrative: US-Iran tensions over the weekend are likely to weigh on EUR/USD at the Tokyo open; EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1723. USD/JPY, which closed Friday at 157.03, is likely to extend gains on geopolitical risk premium. AUD/USD, which closed Friday at 0.7208, is likely to be supported by a potential crude bid. The bull steepener yield curve regime sets up a risk-on environment, but geopolitical risks may dominate the narrative for the Tokyo open.
